description: Perform a data quality audit on the world_survey.gpkg project in QField. Six capital cities (Tokyo, Ottawa, Cairo, Canberra, Buenos Aires, and London) have been flagged for review due to a potential data corruption issue where their coordinate attributes (latitude/longitude text fields) may have been overwritten with incorrect values. Inspect the 'latitude' and 'longitude' attributes for these cities and compare them against their real-world locations. If the coordinates are grossly incorrect (placing the city on a different continent), edit the feature and set the 'notes' field to exactly 'MISLOCATED'. If the coordinates are approximately correct, leave the 'notes' field unchanged. Note: The map markers (geometry) may still be in the correct locations; rely on the 'latitude' and 'longitude' text attributes for your audit.
